evaluations.name: basic-vault-creation
evaluations.description: Create a vault and enable integrations
evaluations.prompt: Help me create a new GLAM vault called 'My Treasury' with SOL and USDC as assets, then enable Jupiter swap integration.
expectedBehaviors: Uses glam vault create command with --name flag
Includes --assets flag with SOL and USDC mint addresses
Uses glam integrations enable command for JupiterSwap

evaluations.name: token-swap-jupiter
evaluations.prompt: I have a GLAM vault at address ABC123. I want to swap 500 USDC to SOL with 1% slippage tolerance.

evaluations.name: delegate-setup
evaluations.description: Set up delegate permissions for trading
evaluations.prompt: Configure my vault at address VAULT123 to allow wallet TRADER456 to perform swaps and Drift trading operations.
expectedBehaviors: Includes Drift-related permissions (DriftDeposit, DriftWithdraw, DriftPlaceOrders, etc.)

evaluations.name: tokenized-vault-workflow
evaluations.description: Create a tokenized vault with share class
evaluations.prompt: Create a tokenized investment vault named 'Alpha Fund' with share token symbol 'ALPHA', enable Jupiter and Kamino integrations, and set up a trading delegate.
expectedBehaviors: Uses glam vault create with --share-class-name and --share-class-symbol flags
Uses glam delegates grant for setting up delegate

evaluations.name: kamino-lending-deposit
evaluations.description: Deposit assets to Kamino lending market
evaluations.prompt: I want to deposit 1000 USDC from my vault at VAULT_ADDR to Kamino lending to earn yield.
expectedBehaviors: Checks if KaminoLend integration is enabled
Uses glam kamino init if not already initialized
Uses glam kamino deposit with correct market address

evaluations.name: sdk-vault-creation
evaluations.prompt: Show me how to create a GLAM vault programmatically using the TypeScript SDK with SOL and USDC assets.
expectedBehaviors: Creates GlamClient instance with keypair or wallet
Calls client.vault.create() with name and assets array
Shows how to get vault PDA from result

evaluations.name: drift-perp-trading
evaluations.prompt: Initialize Drift for my vault VAULT123, deposit 2000 USDC as collateral, and open a 5 SOL long perpetual position.
expectedBehaviors: Uses glam drift perp with --market-index 0 --amount 5 --direction long

evaluations.name: staking-marinade
evaluations.description: Stake SOL via Marinade liquid staking
evaluations.prompt: Stake 10 SOL from my vault VAULT123 using Marinade to get mSOL.
expectedBehaviors: Enables MarinadeStaking integration if not already enabled
Explains that mSOL liquid staking token will be received

evaluations.name: cctp-bridge
evaluations.prompt: Bridge 1000 USDC from my Solana vault VAULT123 to my Ethereum address 0x742d35Cc6634C0532925a3b844Bc9e7595f00000.
expectedBehaviors: Explains the bridging process and timeline

evaluations.name: error-recovery-unauthorized
evaluations.prompt: I'm getting 'Signer is not authorized' when trying to swap on my vault VAULT123. How do I fix this?
expectedBehaviors: Asks to verify the vault manager address using glam vault view
Suggests checking if using correct keypair
Suggests checking delegate permissions if operating as delegate
Provides glam delegates grant command if needed
Explains the difference between manager and delegate permissions

evaluations.name: sdk-full-workflow
evaluations.description: Complete SDK workflow with multiple operations
evaluations.prompt: Write a TypeScript script that creates a vault, enables Jupiter, deposits some SOL, and performs a swap from SOL to USDC.
expectedBehaviors: Imports GlamClient and related types from @glamsystems/glam-sdk

evaluations.name: multi-protocol-strategy
evaluations.prompt: Set up a yield strategy: deposit USDC to Kamino lending, then use it as collateral to borrow SOL, and stake the borrowed SOL in Marinade.
expectedBehaviors: Initializes Kamino with glam kamino init
Deposits USDC with glam kamino deposit
Borrows SOL with glam kamino borrow
Stakes SOL with marinade stake command
Explains the leverage/risk involved in this strategy
